title: Slot on Liverpool tactics
summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot expressed confidence that his side can mount a comeback against Paris St-Germain in their Champions League quarter-final despite facing a two-goal deficit. Slot believes Liverpool have the capability to pull off another European shock.
content:
Liverpool head coach Arne Slot still believes his side can still do special things ahead of the return leg of their Champions League quarter-final against Paris St-Germain.
The six-time European champions will need to overcome a two-goal deficit to reach the last four of the competition. Slot remains confident that Liverpool have what it takes to pull off another big European shock.

content: Aston Villa and Manchester United will compete in this year's Women's World Sevens tournament, which will be hosted in Brentford.

zh.title: 布伦特福德将举办世界七人橄榄球赛，阿斯顿维拉和曼联参赛
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉和曼联将参加今年的女子世界七人橄榄球赛，该赛事将在布伦特福德举办。该赛事代表了女子橄榄球七人制的重要里程碑。

title: The Wayne Rooney Show
summary: Wayne Rooney examines whether Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta's side are faltering while Pep Guardiola's Manchester City find peak form. The analysis focuses on the momentum shift in the Premier League title race.
content: Are Arteta’s Arsenal cracking just as Guardiola’s Manchester City hit top gear?

zh.title: 韦恩·鲁尼秀
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼分析阿森纳主帅米克尔·阿尔特塔的球队是否在衰落，而佩普·瓜迪奥拉执教的曼城则处于巅峰状态。分析重点是英超联赛争冠势头的转变。
